body_txt: Bob and Alice are presumed to have Done The Deed ...except we (the viewer) don't really know for sure if they did. This is usually portrayed in one of these ways. A favored trope of Sit Coms — especially those that follow the Three's Company template. Often exacerbated by a Shrug of God . Compare Innocent Innuendo — where the answer is a short, but sweet "They didn't". Contrast Fake-Out Make-Out — where they did (sort of), but didn't really "mean it". See also What Did I Do Last Night? and Bedmate Reveal . Usually follows Will They or Won't They? . Can be a set-up for a Secret Relationship reveal. Not to be confused with Did You Just Have Sex? .
